replicateEverything 0.5.0

Find a single replication entry by logical id and optional language

Source: R/replication_resolve.R
find_replication_entry.Rd

what is the logical replication id (the group field when set, otherwise the entry id). When language is NULL, R is preferred when both R and Stata entries exist. Legacy suffixed ids such as tab_1_stata still match by exact id.

Usage

find_replication_entry(meta, what, language = NULL, paper_meta = NULL)

Arguments

meta

Parsed replication metadata.

what

Replication identifier (logical id or legacy entry id).

language

Optional "R" or "stata" engine selector.

paper_meta

Optional paper metadata; defaults to meta$paper.

On this page
